question: What immediate stock market reaction occurred in Tokyo following 7 & I Holdings' rejection of Alimentation Couche-Tard's takeover bid, and which two U.S. retail competitors were visible on the trading floor screens?
answer: 7 & I Holdings' shares fell over 1% in Tokyo, while the stock exchange trading floor displayed Kroger and Albertsons Companies.

video: A stock exchange trading floor displays company names such as Kroger and Albertsons Companies on its screens.
text: 7 & I Holdings' shares fell over 1% by early afternoon in Tokyo following news of the rejected bid.
